event: Family rowing home across a lake
description: A small wooden sailboat with a tan sail moves across choppy blue water. Four figures occupy the boat — a young person at the bow, two adults in the middle rowing, and an elderly figure at the stern steering. The water is a vivid blue with white-capped waves. In the background, a low green shoreline with buildings and trees stretches across the horizon. The sky is overcast. The boat is rendered in warm wood tones against the cool blue water.
